title: This Indicator Tells You Exactly When to ENTER & EXIT Trades!
author: SoheilPKO
summary_bullets: It gives you impulse signal where the momentum is suddenly increasing and a breakout is probably going to happen.
This is one of the best indicators on trading view for scalping strategies and day trading strategies.
So it's suitable for timeframes like 1 minute, 5 minutes, 15 minutes up to 1 hour.

This indicator can be used for any type of trading strategies whether it is trend following strategy, reversal strategy or breakout trading strategy because it gives you a signal when there is a sudden increase of momentum in the market.
Alright, on trading view platform, here we click on indicators and we search BB impulse indicator, this one which is written by lazybear.
Alright, this is the indicator and as you can see it is added here below the chart.
As you can see, we have a histogram and the bars are sometimes above the center line and sometimes below the center line with different colors.
As you can see this indicator is built based on Bollinger bands and it is created by John Bollinger who's the one created the Bollinger bands.

If we go to the settings of the indicator, you can see that we have settings for length and multiplier similar to Bollinger bands and similarly by default the length is set at 20 and the multiplier is set at 2.
We don't change this because this is optimized for most of trading strategies but here we have another two settings which are alert level which is set at 0.24 and impulse level which is set at 0.4.

extracted_rules: This indicator can be used for any type of trading strategies whether it is trend following strategy, reversal strategy or breakout trading strategy because it gives you a signal when there is a sudden increase of momentum in the market.

If we go to the settings of the indicator, you can see that we have settings for length and multiplier similar to Bollinger bands and similarly by default the length is set at 20 and the multiplier is set at 2.

Alright, so this dashed line here is alert level which is set at 0.24 and this solid line here is impulse level which is set at 0.4 so depending on the size of the bar if the bar passes the alert level or impulse level we can have a signal about increase of momentum.

When the bar passes the alert level the dashed line it is alert signal that the momentum is probably going to increase and when the bar passes the impulse level the solid line here it is impulse signal and it tells us that we had a sudden increase of momentum in the market but not any impulse signal means that the price is going to further move in that direction.
